title: Kaifuu redacted compatibility reproduction bundle (KAIFUU-106)
description: A shareable PUBLIC artifact that reproduces kaifuu's compatibility results without any private corpora. It carries KAIFUU-105 claimed-support tuples (exact shape) plus reproduction proofs (public fixture id + sha256 proof hash). It NEVER carries private assets: raw keys, private paths, retail bytes, screenshots, prompt logs, or story text are rejected by the validator (crate::repro_bundle::validate_repro_bundle) with a bundle/tuple/field-named error. The proof hashes + fixture ids are sufficient to reproduce the public-fixture results with no private-corpus reference. Mirrors crate::repro_bundle::ReproBundle (serde camelCase).

supportTuples.description: The embedded KAIFUU-105 claimed-support tuples (exact shape).

reproductionProofs.description: Public reproduction proofs. Each pins the expected public-fixture result for one embedded tuple. tupleId must match a supportTuples[].profileOrFixtureId; fixtureId is a public fixture id (never a private path/corpus).

notes.description: Optional bundle-level notes. Redaction-clean free text only — scanned for the six private-asset classes like every other string field.
